summary: Tightened the pin hygiene check so external GitHub Actions uses refs must be full semver tags or 40-character commit SHAs, while local and docker actions remain accepted.

acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-action-ref-strict-pin-check/commands.log records `nix develop -c just pin-hygiene-check` passing with the repository workflows.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Local and docker actions remain accepted.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-action-ref-strict-pin-check/commands.log records a temporary positive smoke test with `uses: ./actions/local` and `uses: docker://alpine:3.20` passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Branch-ish refs and partial semver refs such as @v4 and @v4.2 are rejected.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-action-ref-strict-pin-check/commands.log records temporary negative smoke tests for `@v4`, `@v4.2`, and `@main` failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Full semver action tags and 40-character SHA refs are accepted.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-action-ref-strict-pin-check/commands.log records temporary positive smoke tests for current full semver refs and a 40-character SHA ref passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: just pin-hygiene-check and just check pass.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded.
No product runtime, cross-device, or related claims are made.

commandsRun.command: temporary negative smoke tests for @v4, @v4.2, and @main
temporary positive smoke tests for full semver refs, a SHA ref, local action, and docker action

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository hygiene gate only; no product runtime validation required.
